Deft Pacific Bell Directory'S Ntc Of Hrg Of Demurrer To Thecomplt Of Pltf Mr. Peter'S Plumbing, Calendar Motion: Hearing, Calendar Motion: Demurrer
Off Calendar Nov-21-2001 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: HEARD ON 11/20/01, PER PARTIES' REQUEST.

Dem To Compl
Off Calendar Nov-20-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Garet D. O'Keefe, Esq. 510/540-8320 for pltf & opposing party; Marvin K. Anderson, Esq. 542-2654 for deft & moving party.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows:
Demurrer sustain with leave to amend 1st & 2nd causes of action fraud and negligent misrepresentation allegations not sufficiently specific. Demurrer to 3rd cause of action breach of contract overruled. Demurrer to 4th cause of action violation of public utilities code sustain with leave to amend. Demurrer to 5th cause of action unfair practice overruled. Demurrer to 6th cause of action overruled, treated as prayer.
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling with the exception that the demurrer to the 4th cause of action violation of public utilities code is sustained without leave to amend. Pltf has 20 days to amend. Deft to prepare order.
